title: Figma in Design System
content: Figma is a primary tool for designers to establish and maintain a robust Design System. It offers a centralized platform for creating and managing a comprehensive library of design components. With Figma, teams can streamline their workflow, ensure consistency, and improve efficiency. The tool allows for the creation and reuse of UI elements, making it easy to maintain a cohesive design language. Its collaborative features enable real-time collaboration and feedback, fostering a unified vision among design teams. in Design Systems Amazon Cloudscape Apple HIG Atlassian Design System Brainly Pencil Datadog Druids eBay Evo Elastic Esri Calcite Github Primer GitLab Pajamas Google Material Design IBM Carbon INPS Sirio Kiwicom Orbit Lemon Squeezy Wedges Microsoft Fluent 2 Monday.com Vibe Porsche Razorpay Blade Rei Cedar Salesforce Lightning Segment Evergreen ServiceNow Horizon Shopify Polaris Teamleader Ahoy Twilio Paste U.S. Web Uber Base Visa Washington Post Wikimedia Codex WorkOS Radix Zendesk Garden
